title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Abbott India Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Abbott India Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
We at Abbott India Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Pune. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Abbott India Holdings Services:
Abbott India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Abbott India Holdings Services!
